name: Nachiket More
summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications, REST APIs, and cloud-deployed systems using React, Django, Node.js, and AWS. Skilled in both frontend and backend development, CI/CD automation, and database design.

info: Built a multi-service data verification pipeline using FastAPI, with an orchestrator managing 6 independent microservices running concurrently and sequentially based on data dependencies.
Integrated OpenAI API across services for structured data extraction, semantic inference, and natural language scoring.
Designed parallel execution in the orchestrator for independent services, reducing end-to-end pipeline latency.
Built React UI components for internal dashboards, focusing on clean state management and reusable components.
Connected frontend features to backend APIs and handled loading, error, and empty states.
Set up CI/CD workflows using Netlify to automatically deploy frontend changes on every merge.
Developed full-stack web features using React and Node.js for consumer-facing applications.
Implemented backend APIs and integrated AWS services including DynamoDB and API Gateway.
Worked on deployment and environment configuration using AWS Amplify for production releases.
Built and styled responsive web pages for client projects.
Assisted in frontend development and cross-browser testing.

publications.title: Comparative Study Of Flight Delay Prediction Using Back Propagation And Radial Basis Function
publications.publisher: International Research Journal of Engineering and Technology (IRJET)

projects.summary: End-to-end RAG pipeline to semantically search and query codebases using natural language.
info: Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline to index and query codebases using LangChain, ChromaDB as the vector store, and OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for semantic embeddings.
Implemented document ingestion from GitHub repos and direct file uploads, chunking source files and storing vector embeddings for context-aware retrieval.
Designed a Q&A chain using GPT-4o-mini with retrieved context windows, returning answers with source file references ranked by similarity score.
Built a React + TypeScript frontend with ingestion controls, a chat interface, and real-time source attribution display.

projects.summary: Digital wallet with ledger-based accounting, Redis caching, and mock Razorpay payment flow.
info: Built a digital wallet system with user authentication, balance tracking, money transfers, and transaction history using a ledger-based accounting model.
Ensured data consistency using database transactions for atomic transfers and Redis caching for balances and recent transactions.
Implemented a mock Razorpay-style add-money flow with webhook simulation and deployed across Render, Vercel, Neon (PostgreSQL), and Upstash (Redis).

projects.summary: Full-stack task manager with natural language input parsing powered by OpenAI GPT-4o-mini.
info: Built a full-stack task manager with Next.js API Routes and Prisma ORM backed by PostgreSQL, supporting full CRUD with priority levels and due dates.
Integrated OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to parse natural language input into structured tasks, automatically extracting task name, priority, and due date.
Implemented runtime request validation using Zod on all API routes with proper HTTP status codes, 404 handling, and RESTful dynamic [id] routing.
Deployed on Vercel with Neon-hosted PostgreSQL; Prisma client singleton pattern prevents connection pool exhaustion during Next.js hot reloads.

projects.project_title: Web App for Quick and Easy Recipes
projects.summary: Full-stack recipe app with real-time search, AWS-deployed infrastructure, and containerized services.
info: Developed full-stack recipe app with React frontend and Django REST API backend integrated with DynamoDB, handling 500+ recipe records.
Built a responsive React frontend with real-time search and filtering; styled with Tailwind CSS ensuring 100% responsive design across devices.
Deployed frontend to AWS S3 and backend to Elastic Beanstalk via AWS CodePipeline CI/CD, reducing deployment time by 70%.
Containerized services with Docker; added Swagger API docs and secured endpoints using OAuth2.

projects.summary: Backend sentiment analysis pipeline processing 1,000+ movie reviews per day using Google Cloud NLP and TMDb API.
info: Created a backend sentiment analysis pipeline using the TMDb API and Google Cloud Natural Language API, processing 1,000+ reviews per day.
Containerized the app with Docker and deployed to Google Cloud Run with auto-scaling and load balancing enabled.

projects.summary: Interactive dashboard with map overlays and MongoDB aggregation pipelines.
info: Built an interactive flight data dashboard with dynamic charts and geographic map overlays.
Designed aggregation pipelines in MongoDB to efficiently query and group large flight datasets by route, airline, and time range.
Architected a REST API layer in Node.js with query filtering, pagination, and response caching.

projects.summary: Full-stack trivia game with Auth0 login, Docker containers, and real-time scoring.
info: Created a full-stack trivia game with user authentication via Auth0 and real-time score tracking.
Containerized frontend and backend services using Docker for consistent local and production environments.
